html.innerTextSample: Kim Wermes is a Berlin-based Interdisciplinary Designer and Artist who works in the fields of Webdesign, Sound Design and Graphic Design. He studied Media & Interaction Design (B.A.) at the HS Osnabrü

keyframes.name: falling

abrissRules.cssText: .paper-top { background-color: white; min-height: 60%; border-bottom: 2px dotted black; padding: 2rem; }
.abriss { font-size: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; min-width: 0px; flex: 1 1 0%; border-inline: 0.5px solid black; background-color: white; }
.abriss.falling { animation: 2s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running falling; }
.abriss-content { transform: rotate(90deg); text-align: center; white-space: nowrap; }
